meaning: adj.草木丛生的,被森林所覆盖的
examples: Only 8 percent of the area is forested.
The road snaked through forested mountains.
The province is heavily forested and sparsely populated.
Hekmatyar's stomping grounds include Kunar province, a sweep of heavily forested mountains in eastern Afghanistan.
The sun is falling, silhouetting the forested skyline and covering our sails in its yellowy glow.
